message:
Fix: remove duplicate flush_no_db_if_dirty() call in defer command

The defer command's execute_defer() function had a duplicate call to
storage_ctx.flush_no_db_if_dirty() at the end of the function. This
was likely a copy-paste error during development.

While the duplicate call was harmless (flush is idempotent and only
operates when no-db mode is active), it added unnecessary overhead
and could cause confusion during code review.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
